name: RPG I Omegaverse
description:
This is an RPG based on the omegaverse universe.

_____________________________________________

You can be an alpha/beta/omega, get your personal or work life back on track. Let your imagination run wild!

You can become a successful student, athlete, politician, employee of the year, find your destiny and love, or turn this world upside down. Choose your own destiny!

NOTE:

If the first sentence you wrote later is too small, then click on the icon at the bottom to rewrite it. This will fix it and the bot will write more.

_________________________
